ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document or article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author of the document */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the family associated with the document */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., article, book, letter) */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, image, text) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the document was created or is related to */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication or creation of the document */,
  "historical_context" TEXT /* Historical context or significance of the document */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the document (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to facilitate searching and categorization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., BC Archives) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "family_description" TEXT /* Description of the family and its historical significance */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region the family is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region and its historical significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the document the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user contact */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
